title: The Last Good Rain
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: When a drought grips their Kenyan village for the seventh year, a grandmother begins weaving clouds from river reeds, and her grandchildren must protect her magic from a preacher who calls it witchcraft.
long_description: When a drought grips their Kenyan village for the seventh year, a grandmother begins weaving clouds from river reeds, and her grandchildren must protect her magic from a preacher who calls it witchcraft.
